series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, photographs and multimedia files in any and all formats, negatives, slides, and other output documenting events, activities, and other occasions for the Office of the Governor, or for the Development Services Agency. NOTE: Photographs and multimedia files that serve a temporary purpose and are of transient and limited value should be managed in accordance with the Agency’s Transient Documents retention schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format. If also stored in electronic/digital format, or if converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion and if no longer of value in paper form. ; Electronic: Retain in office or offsite storage during current administration, then transfer to State Archives. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
